name.en: Talad San Chao and the Night-Market Layer
name.nl: Talad San Chao en de night-marketlaag

address: Na San Jao market area, Surat Thani city
opening_hours: Market rhythm shifts by stall and day. Late afternoon into evening is the safest planning window.

description.en: The strongest food-and-evening stop in town, tied to Na San Jao market and the older streets around it.
description.nl: De sterkste food- en avondstop in de stad, gekoppeld aan Na San Jao-markt en de oudere straten eromheen.

metaTitle.en: Talad San Chao and Surat Thani Night Market | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Talad San Chao en Surat Thani night market | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Talad San Chao is the most useful market-and-evening layer in Surat Thani.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Talad San Chao de nuttigste markt- en avondlaag van Surat Thani is.

enhanced_description:
This is the city market layer that actually helps Surat Thani feel alive. It is stronger than the old generic walking-street copy because it is attached to Na San Jao's real food logic, nearby small eats, and the older urban fabric rather than to anonymous night-bazaar claims.

Khao Kriab Pak Mor alone is enough to show why this area matters: MICHELIN still uses the Na San Jao market stall as a current city food reference. That is the right lens for the whole area.
detailed_history: Current MICHELIN Surat Thani coverage keeps Na San Jao market visible through its longstanding dumpling stall and the city's broader old-town-and-food layer, which is more useful than treating the market as generic evening entertainment.
visitor_experience: Expect a real market environment rather than a polished tourist production. The best version is simple: walk, snack, watch the local flow, and keep dinner in the same area if the route supports it.

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Easy by short ride from anywhere in the city core, then best explored on foot.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Talat Lang, the 100-Year Arch Bridge, and the city-pillar layer.
practical_info.food_options: Khao Kriab Pak Mor is the obvious anchor; other city-center breakfast, noodle, and dinner stops are close enough to build around it.
practical_info.shopping: Keep expectations local and practical rather than souvenir-driven.

insider_tips: Pair this with the old-town block rather than treating it as a separate city night out.
Use it for selective eating, not for trying to cover every stall.
This works especially well after an afternoon heritage walk.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current MICHELIN coverage of Na San Jao market and the broader Surat Thani old-town food layer.
cultural_significance: Talad San Chao matters because it ties Surat Thani's city-center food culture to a real market street rather than to generic travel copy or ranking sites.

contentSources.name: A Guide to Surat Thani: Thailand's Southern Gem That the White Lotus Production Crossed the Ocean For
